briefdescription.para: Creates a ImageVisual object.

simplesect.para: The newly created image visual object.

briefdescription.para: Gets the resource url of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The resource url of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the resource url of the ImageVisual.
Gets whether synchronous loading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous loading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image is loaded synchronously.

parameterdescription.para: True to load the image on the main thread synchronously

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired width of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired width of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired width of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the desired height of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The desired height of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the desired height of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the sampling mode of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The sampling mode of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the sampling mode of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the pixel area of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The pixel area of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the pixel area of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for u coordinate of the ImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for u coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the wrap mode for v coordinate of the ImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The wrap mode for v coordinate to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether broken image is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if broken image is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to enable broken image.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the load policy of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The load policy of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the load policy of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the release policy of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The release policy of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the release policy of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the fitting mode of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The fitting mode of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the fitting mode of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether orientation correction is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if orientation correction is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to correct the image orientation.

parameterdescription.para: True to correct the image orientation

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether synchronous sizing is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if synchronous sizing is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to use synchronous sizing.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether fast track uploading is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if fast track uploading is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to use fast track uploading.

parameterdescription.para: True to use fast track uploading

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the NPatch border of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The NPatch border of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the NPatch border of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether NPatch border only is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if NPatch border only is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to draw only the borders.

parameterdescription.para: True to draw only the borders

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the auxiliary image url of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The auxiliary image url of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the auxiliary image url of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Only available if resource is n-patch, or NpatchBorder applied.

parameterdescription.para: The auxiliary image url to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the auxiliary image alpha of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Only available if resource is n-patch, or NpatchBorder applied.
The auxiliary image alpha of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the auxiliary image alpha of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Only available if resource is n-patch, or NpatchBorder applied.

parameterdescription.para: The auxiliary image alpha to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether pre-multiplied alpha is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if pre-multiplied alpha is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the image uses pre-multiplied alpha.

parameterdescription.para: True if the image has pre-multiplied alpha

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the alpha mask url of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The alpha mask url of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the alpha mask url of the ImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The alpha mask url to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the mask content scale of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The mask content scale of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the mask content scale of the ImageVisual.

parameterdescription.para: The mask content scale to set

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets whether crop to mask is enabled.

simplesect.para: True if crop to mask is enabled

briefdescription.para: Sets whether to crop to mask.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: Gets the masking type of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: The masking type of the ImageVisual

briefdescription.para: Sets the masking type of the ImageVisual.

simplesect.para: Reference to this for fluent chaining

briefdescription.para: This constructor is used by Dali New() methods.

parameterdescription.para: A pointer to a newly allocated Dali resource

briefdescription.para: ImageVisual is a owner of Visual::Base with Visual::IMAGE, to render simple image.

detaileddescription.para: It can use CornerRadius / CornerSquareness / Borderline feature only if image is not n-patch image or set BORDER property.
